mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_flow_instance_task_record WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} and audit_status = #{auditStatus}

SELECT itr.*, te.actual_name as handlerName FROM t_flow_instance_task_record itr left join t_employee te on itr.handler = te.employee_id WHERE itr.instance_id = #{instanceId} and itr.task_id in
#{item}
